final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art portrait
Asset type: museum-quality oil painting reproduction
Primary request: contemporary professional woman portrait rendered in Dutch Golden Age Rembrandt lighting technique
Scene/backdrop: deep dark brown chiaroscuro background with minimal detail, void-like atmosphere
Subject: East Asian woman around 35 years old wearing dark business suit, wise and resolute expression, holding a thick heavy book in her hands with detailed knuckles and skin texture
Style/medium: classical oil painting, thick impasto brushwork, Rembrandt chiaroscuro technique
Composition/framing: three-quarter portrait, face as focal point with Rembrandt triangle highlight on cheek
Lighting/mood: dramatic Rembrandt lighting with triangular highlight on one side of face, soft shadows on the other side, warm and solemn mood
Color palette: brown umber, ochre, deep crimson, bright warm white only on facial highlights
Materials/textures: heavy oil paint texture with visible brushstrokes, realistic skin and fabric details
Constraints: preserve Rembrandt lighting triangle on face, keep background dark and minimal, hands must show detailed anatomy and skin texture
Avoid: modern lighting, bright background, flat lighting, digital smoothness, contemporary fashion photography look
